content.query:
CREATE VIEW      v_Usage
-- drop view v_Usage
as
/*
SELECT          'Sales' as [Usage Type]
--,               OC.CUNO AS [Customer Number]
--,               OC.CUNM as [Customer Name]
,               OH.ORNO as [Order Number]
--,               OH.CUOR as [Customer PO]
--,               OH.RLDT as [Requested Date]
,               cast(cast(ODH.ACDT as varchar(10)) as date)  as [Tran Date]
,               IM.ITCL as Brand
--,               OL.PONR as [Line Number]
,               OL.ITNO as [Item Number]
,               IM.ITDS as [Item Name]
,               OL.WHLO as [Warehouse]
,               IM.PRGP as [Procurement Group]
--,               OL.NEPR as [Unit Price]
,               SUM(ODL.IVQT) as [Quantity]
,               0 as [Cost]
FROM			M3.FSLEDG LE --26749
JOIN			M3.OINVOH IV ON LE.CINO = IV.EXIN --15784
JOIN			M3.ODHEAD ODH ON ODH.IVNO = IV.IVNO AND LE.PYNO = ODH.PYNO and LE.ACDT = cast(cast(ODH.ACDT as varchar(10)) as date)
JOIN			M3.ODLINE ODL ON ODH.ORNO = ODL.ORNO AND ODH.DLIX = ODL.DLIX
JOIN			M3.OOLINE AS OL ON ODL.ORNO = OL.ORNO AND ODL.PONR = OL.PONR AND ODL.POSX = OL.POSX
JOIN            M3.OOHEAD OH on OL.ORNO = OH.ORNO
JOIN			M3.OCUSMA AS OC ON ODH.CUNO = OC.CUNO 
JOIN			M3.MITMAS AS IM ON ODL.ITNO = IM.ITNO
WHERE			LE.TRCD = 10
AND				LE.IVTP <> 'CN'
and             ODH.ACDT <> 0
and             OH.ORNO NOT LIKE '5%'
GROUP BY        OH.ORNO, ODH.ACDT, IM.ITCL, OL.ITNO, IM.ITDS, OL.WHLO, IM.PRGP

UNION ALL       
*/

SELECT			A.*
,				B.Cost
FROM
(
SELECT			'Manufacturing' as [Usage Type]
,				MWH.MFNO AS [Order Number]
,				CAST(CAST(MWH.RPDT AS varchar(10)) AS date) AS [Tran Date]
,				MI.ITCL as Brand
,				MWM.MTNO as [Item Number]
,				MI.ITDS AS [Item Name]
,				MWH.WHLO AS Warehouse
,				MI.PRGP AS [Procurement Group]
,				SUM(RPQT) AS Quantity
FROM            M3.MWOHED AS MWH
JOIN			M3.MWOMAT AS MWM on MWH.MFNO = MWM.MFNO and MWH.ITNO = MWM.PRNO
JOIN			M3.MITMAS AS MI ON MWM.MTNO = MI.ITNO 
WHERE			(MWH.WHHS IN (60, 80, 90)) AND (MWH.MAQA <> 0)
GROUP BY		MWM.MTNO, MI.ITDS, MI.PRGP, MWH.WHLO, MWH.MFNO, MWH.RPDT, MI.ITCL
) A 

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT			RIDN AS [Order Number]
,				MTNO as [Item Number]
,				AVG(TOAF) AS Cost
FROM            M3.CPOMAT
GROUP BY		RIDN, MTNO
) B ON A.[Order Number] = B.[Order Number] and A.[Item Number] = B.[Item Number]
